rows.description: Computus Gu: Paynter Rectory a secundo die
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly identifies this as a distinct header line. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this line with the next, misrepresenting the visible structure.
Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly identifies this as a distinct header line. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this line with the previous, misrepresenting the visible structure.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit comput: de remanentib: in lista 11 9 46
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description is more accurate ('Imprimis' not 'Impumis'). It correctly identified the numbers '11 9 46' as embedded in the header text, not as separate monetary amounts. Claude-haiku incorrectly parsed these as amounts and also merged this line with the next one, misrepresenting the visible structure.
Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly identifies this as a distinct header line. Claude-haiku incorrectly merged this line with the previous, misrepresenting the visible structure.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Correct description and accurate amount reading of '60 0 0' from the image. Claude-haiku misread the description ('Guanaear') and the pounds amount (6 instead of 60).

Description taken from claude-haiku ('Longwitnam' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Longwitham'). Amounts taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly reads '76 13 4' from the image; claude-haiku misread pounds (7 instead of 76) and pence (1 instead of 4), and categorized as 'header' instead of 'entry'.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description ('Minhinnett') and amount reading ('20 0 0'). Claude-haiku misread the description ('Minhinett') and the pounds amount (2 instead of 20).

Amounts selected from gpt-5-mini, which correctly reads '30 0 0'. Claude-haiku misread the pounds amount (3 instead of 30). Description text modified slightly from gpt-5-mini to match the visual layout of 'pro mici' as a phrase on the same line without parentheses, as presented by claude-haiku.
Consensus between extractors on description and the absence of amounts for this row, visually confirmed.

Description visually verified as 'Chacehill' (neither extractor fully accurate). Amounts (03 00 8) from gpt-5-mini, which correctly identified the main digits. However, gpt-5-mini missed the fraction. Visually verified that there is a clear trailing mark after '8' in pence column, resembling 'ob' or 'd' loop, which per guidance is interpreted as 0.5 fraction. Claude-haiku incorrectly reported no amounts for this line.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed that 'Thrup' has no associated amount on its line. Claude-haiku incorrectly assigned the amount intended for 'Chacehill' to 'Thrup' due to misalignment.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Correct description ('Jue' not 'Sue' as in claude-haiku) and `row_type` 'header'. Both extractors correctly identified no amounts for this line, visually confirmed.

Description from claude-haiku ('marshall' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'marshally'). Amounts selected from gpt-5-mini as claude-haiku's pence value (15) was invalid and failed the hard rule filter. gpt-5-mini's reading of '02 15 7' is visually confirmed.
Description from gpt-5-mini ('Calcott' is more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Lalcott'). Both extractors agree on the absence of amounts for this row, visually confirmed.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate amount reading of '03 8 11'. Claude-haiku showed significant column misalignment, reading '0 3 8' instead.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description ('Mountague' is clearer than claude-haiku's 'Mourtaoge') and amount reading ('04 0 0'). Claude-haiku misread description and showed column misalignment.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description ('Hughes' is clearer than claude-haiku's 'Heighes') and amount reading ('01 12 0'). Claude-haiku incorrectly reported no amounts for this line.

Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description ('Greeneway' is clearer than claude-haiku's 'Greenerage') and amount reading ('00 10 0'). Claude-haiku's pence value (12) was invalid, failing the hard rule filter.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate amount reading ('00 15 0'). Claude-haiku showed incorrect column alignment, reading '0 0 10'.
Selected gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed no amounts for this row. Claude-haiku incorrectly assigned an invalid pence value (15), failing the hard rule filter.
Consensus between extractors on description and the absence of amounts for this row, visually confirmed.
Consensus between extractors on description and the absence of amounts for this row, visually confirmed.

Description from gpt-5-mini, accurately including the brace. Amounts visually verified as '02 5 5'. Claude-haiku incorrectly had column misalignment ('0 2 5'). Claude-haiku correctly identified the presence of a fraction but misread it as 0.5. The trailing mark after '5' in pence column is clearly a 'q', which per guidance is interpreted as 0.25 fraction. Gpt-5-mini missed the fraction entirely.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Description accurately reflects the brace and indentation (claude-haiku incorrectly prepended 'Tintinhull'). Amounts are visually confirmed as '01 18 7'. Claude-haiku's pence value (18) was invalid, failing the hard rule filter.

Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description ('Clifton Ferry' is clearer than claude-haiku's 'Clifton Gerry') and amount reading ('03 19 8'). Claude-haiku incorrectly reported no amounts for this line.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate amount reading ('01 15 6'). Claude-haiku's pence value (19) was invalid, failing the hard rule filter.

Visually verified that 'Brew house' has no associated amount on its line. Claude-haiku incorrectly assigned an invalid pence value (15), failing the hard rule filter. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the amount '01 15 6', which belongs to the 'Bensington' row above.
Selected gpt-5-mini for accurate description ('Trethewin' is clearer than claude-haiku's 'Trethewrin') and amount reading ('06 9 7'). Claude-haiku showed incorrect column alignment, reading '0 6 9'.
Consensus between extractors on description and the absence of amounts for this row, visually confirmed.
Consensus between extractors on description, row type, and amounts ('230 13 8'), visually confirmed. This final total also serves as the master alignment reference for column positions.
